title: CH Motion
description: A simple but very good low performance motion blur pack, which enhances the vanilla experience!
body:
![Thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f98bcd46d9ee81002e64af5096c4e3630172ad1.jpeg)

# CH Motion
---

**CH Motion is a simple, super lightweight motion blur pack that enhances the vanilla experience — beautiful, smooth motion blur with virtually no performance cost.**

It adds satisfying screen-space motion blur as a post-processing effect while keeping everything you love about vanilla intact. Just clean, smooth blur layered on top as you move and turn.

---

## Features

- **Smooth camera motion blur** - that satisfying FPS-game feel when you turn and move
- **Vanilla-faithful** - your world looks exactly like vanilla, just with blur on top
- **Extremely lightweight** - a pure post-process effect; if you can run vanilla, you can run this
- **Fully configurable** - tune the blur to your taste in the shader settings

## Settings

| Option | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| **Motion Blur** | Toggles the entire effect on or off |
| **Motion Blur Strength** | How strong the blur is — higher is more intense |
| **Motion Blur Samples** | Smoothness of the blur — higher is smoother, slightly heavier |
| **Motion Blur Noise** | Subtle dithering that keeps the blur clean and free of banding |

## Compatibility

- Made for **Iris** & **Optifine** 

## Recommendations

- Keep **Motion Blur Samples** near the default for the smoothest result; lower it only if you want to squeeze out extra frames
- Crank **Strength** up for a punchy, cinematic feel during fast-paced play, or keep it low for a subtle touch


*Enjoy! Feedback and suggestions are always welcome in the comments.*
